data.name: Hentai Shanti
data.detailed_description:
🎮 🌴 Hentai Shanti is not just an adult puzzle game. It's your journey into the heart of the wild jungle, where the seductive Shanti awaits — the fiery daughter of the tribe's chief who loves to play... and not just with puzzles.

Each level is a piece of her body, a fragment of her desire — a secret you can unlock only by assembling all the parts. Puzzle by puzzle, you get closer to her most intimate side — sultry glances, bare skin, playful poses… Shanti is waiting for you to prove you're worthy of seeing her in full.


🔞 Game Features:

🔥 30 erotic levels — each puzzle reveals part of Shanti’s story.

🏆 30 achievements — become a true shaman of puzzles.

🖼️ Gallery — unlock and save vivid erotic illustrations.


🎯 3 difficulty modes — from relaxing meditation to a real challenge:

  • Easy — quick pleasure with minimal effort.

  • Medium — a bit of challenge, maximum enjoyment.

  • Hard — a true test, but only the most enduring will see all of Shanti.


Feel the breath of the jungle and dive into a world of wild beauty and temptation.

data.short_description: Shanti is already undressing — all that's left is to piece her together.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
